scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.codegen: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen && pnpm --filter @workspace/scripts run generate:api-zod-barrel && prettier --write "lib/api-client-react/src/generated" "lib/api-zod/src/generated"
scripts.codegen:check: pnpm run codegen && git diff --exit-code -- lib/api-client-react/src/generated lib/api-zod/src/generated
scripts.spec-sync: pnpm run codegen && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm run check:conflicts && pnpm run check:prompt-manifest && eslint --max-warnings 0 "artifacts/urban-explorer/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "artifacts/api-server/**/*.{ts,tsx}"
scripts.ci: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck
